@@ -14,12 +14,19 @@
   "created_at": "2022-02-03T10:04:09Z",
   "github_updated_at": "2026-02-21T10:23:19Z",
   "body_snippet": "Under \"Inheritance\", there are 2 sets of fields with the same names, even though their functions are different:\r\n1) \"Minutes To Idle\".  The 2nd field with this name should probably be labelled \"Alert on disconnect due to idle\".\r\n2) \"Disable Cursor Shadow\".  Both fields with this name appear to have the same help text.  One should probably be deleted.\r\n\r\n## Expected Behavior\r\nEach field name & function should be unique.\r\n\r\n## Current Behavior\r\nDuplicate field names.\r\n\r\n## Your Environment\r\nWindow...",
-  "our_status": "new",
-  "priority": null,
+  "our_status": "triaged",
+  "priority": "P2-bug",
   "target_release": null,
   "our_branch": null,
   "our_pr": null,
-  "iterations": [],
+  "iterations": [
+    {
+      "seq": 1,
+      "date": "2026-02-23",
+      "type": "triaged",
+      "description": "The 'Duplicate field names' issue likely originates from a conflict in how 'UserField' and 'UserFieldX' properties are processed during XML serialization or deserialization, potentially causing data mapping collisions."
+    }
+  ],
   "comments": [
     {
       "id": "IC_kwDOAAcIMM7mYhCr",
@@ -36,5 +43,5 @@
   "needs_action": false,
   "waiting_for_us": false,
   "last_synced": "2026-02-21T12:06:48Z",
-  "notes": ""
+  "notes": "AI triage (gemini): The 'Duplicate field names' issue likely originates from a conflict in how 'UserField' and 'UserFieldX' properties are processed during XML serialization or deserialization, potentially causing data mapping collisions.\nApproach: Analyze the handling of 'UserField' and 'UserFieldX' properties within XmlConnectionsDeserializer.cs and XmlConnectionsSaver.cs, and related ConnectionInfo logic, to identify and correct any logic that leads to ambiguous or duplicate field interpretations during data operations."
 }
